nasb.text: Let those who persecute me be put to shame, but as for me, let me not be put to shame; Let them be dismayed, but let me not be dismayed. Bring on them a day of disaster, And crush them with twofold destruction!

esv.text: Let those be put to shame who persecute me, but let me not be put to shame; let them be dismayed, but let me not be dismayed; bring upon them the day of disaster; destroy them with double destruction!

cnv.text: 願那些迫害我的蒙羞，卻不要叫我蒙羞； 願他們驚恐，卻不要使我驚恐； 求你使災禍的日子臨到他們，加倍毀滅他們。

ccb.text: 愿你使那些迫害我的人蒙羞， 不要使我蒙羞； 愿你使他们惊慌， 不要使我惊慌。 求你使他们大祸临头， 彻底毁灭他们。
